subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! The Lord of Power hath, from the Most Great Scene, turned toward thee and favored thee with His attention. Say: Unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر مالک قدر در منظر اکبر بتو اقبال نموده و توجه فرموده قل لک
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
